ORDER GRANTING AMERICAN CANYON FLAT LAND COMPANY, INC.'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER AMERICAN CANYON FLAT LAND COMPANY, INC'S MOTION IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS GLEN COUCH, DAVID COUCH AND GEORGE COUCH STATED ON THE RECORD THAT THEY AGREE ON GOING TO ARBITRATION WITHIN 90 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL R. JOHNSON APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
GLEN COUCH, TEL. NO. (707) 373-8173, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
DAVID COUCH, TEL. NO. (707) 655-2562, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
GEORGE COUCH, TEL. NO. (707) 342-8479, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER AMERICAN CANYON FLAT LAND COMPANY, INC'S Motion In Support Of Petition To Compel Arbitration IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS GLEN COUCH, DAVID COUCH AND GEORGE COUCH STATED ON THE RECORD THAT THEY AGREE ON GOING TO ARBITRATION WITHIN 90 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL R. JOHNSON, TEL. NO. (559) 584-6656 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
GLEN COUCH, TEL. NO. (707) 373-8173, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
DAVID COUCH, TEL. NO. (707) 655-2562, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
GEORGE COUCH, TEL. NO. (707) 342-8479, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER AMERICAN CANYON FLAT LAND COMPANY, INCORPORATED'S Motion In Support Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award - DEFENDANTS GLEN COUCH, DAVID COUCH AND GEORGE COUCH STATED ON THE RECORD THAT THEY AGREE ON GOING TO ARBITRATION WITHIN 90 DAYS.
